problem id: 9d964043
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  01000110 -> 10000100
  10111111 -> 11001011
  00011100 -> 00000001
  10010000 -> 00001001
  00010001 -> 01000001
  01101100 -> 00000110
  00000110 -> 10000000
  11001111 -> 11001100

query: 11110001
predicted answer: 01001111
